song.title: Behold How Good and How Pleasant
song.author: Psalm 133
song.lyrics:
[V1] .C F C G 1) Behold how good and how pleasant it is . F G C G For brethren to dwell together in unity. .C F C G Behold how good and how pleasant it is . F G C G For brethren to dwell together in unity.
[C] .F C G C F G Chorus It is like the precious ointment upon the head, . C G F G That ran down upon the beard, even Aaron’s beard, . F G C That went down to the skirts of his garments.
[V2] .C F C G 2) Behold how good and how pleasant it is . F G C G For brethren to dwell together in unity.
[V3] .C G Am G 3) As the dew of Hermon, as the dew that descended, . F C G Upon the mountains of Zion. . F G C F For there the Lord commanded the blessing, . C G C Even life forevermore.
